app_info.subtitle: Verify AI with evidence
app_info.description: Exovia ProofLayer helps people inspect AI outputs for evidence gaps, privacy risks, prompt injection and missing human control; preserve portable context; compile source-linked EXO capability packs with progressive disclosure; compare answers against the same evidence; move work into a visual NeuroCanvas review map; choose a safer provider-neutral AI route; review consequential work through a twelve-lens Assurance Council with visible dissent and ExiaL/EXIR handoffs; and generate an auditable Proof Pack with SHA-256 integrity.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes a heuristic reliability report from submitted text and evidence without storing or changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, contact third parties or modify public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Transforms supplied context and evidence into a portable Markdown capsule without persisting it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Returns the capsule only to the current ChatGPT interaction and does not transmit it to another service.
justifications.destructive_justification: Creates no external record and cannot remove or overwrite user data.

justifications.read_only_justification: Compiles submitted sources into an in-memory, source-linked EXO JSON package with redaction, indexing, procedures, constraints and an integrity fingerprint.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not retrieve outside content, publish the package, invoke an AI provider or install a generated capability.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not execute procedures, change files, modify a NeuroCanvas workspace or perform external actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes an importable JSON graph from supplied content and evidence without writing to the NeuroCanvas product.
justifications.open_world_justification: The map is returned to the user and is not published or uploaded to an external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not alter the source content or an existing NeuroCanvas workspace.

justifications.read_only_justification: Calculates a transparent heuristic ranking from supplied answers and evidence without mutating any source.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not send the answers to models, websites or third-party systems.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot delete, overwrite or act on any compared answer.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes a provider-neutral local, hybrid or cloud recommendation from risk settings.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not select, invoke or configure an external model or provider.
justifications.destructive_justification: Returns guidance only and performs no operational change.

justifications.read_only_justification: Applies twelve deterministic review lenses to submitted content and evidence, then returns visible dissent, prioritized actions, ExiaL handoffs, EXIR events, an integrity fingerprint and an in-memory NeuroCanvas handoff.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not invoke twelve models, contact external services, publish the report or execute any recommended action.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot approve, reject, deploy or alter the reviewed work; it explicitly requires accountable human approval.

justifications.read_only_justification: Builds an in-memory evidence package and integrity fingerprint from submitted material without persisting it.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish the package or execute the documented decision.
justifications.destructive_justification: Explicitly records that no external action was executed and cannot change external state.

test_cases.description: Detect evidence, privacy and prompt-injection risks in an AI answer.
test_cases.user_prompt: Use Exovia to analyze this AI answer against the two sources I provide and explain any unsupported claims, private data or instructions that try to override the system.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns an interactive heuristic report with a trust score, dimension scores, clearly prioritized findings and an explicit human-review limitation.

test_cases.description: Compile reusable source knowledge without losing provenance or privacy.
test_cases.user_prompt: Compile these manuals and research notes into an inspectable Exovia .exo capability pack. Keep source and chunk IDs, extract procedures and constraints, redact sensitive values, estimate the initial context reduction and require human approval for actions.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a downloadable JSON-based .exo package containing a manifest, source-linked on-demand chunks, search index, glossary, procedures, constraints, safety rules, redaction count and SHA-256 fingerprint.

test_cases.description: Review a consequential AI-supported decision through transparent specialist lenses.
test_cases.user_prompt: Run the Exovia Assurance Council on this proposed launch decision and its evidence. Keep every blocking role and dissent visible, separate imported instructions from authority, create ExiaL and EXIR handoffs, prioritize the human actions and give me a NeuroCanvas file for review.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns twelve deterministic role reviews, a consensus score and bounded verdict, visible dissent and blocking roles, prioritized human actions, ExiaL pulses, EXIR events, a safe route, a SHA-256 integrity fingerprint and a downloadable NeuroCanvas council map. It explicitly says these are rule-based lenses rather than independent model consensus.

test_cases.description: Move a conversation into the visual human-review product.
test_cases.user_prompt: Turn this conversation, decision and attached evidence into an importable Exovia NeuroCanvas map for human review.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns a downloadable neurocanvas-v3 JSON graph that preserves source text, evidence nodes, relationships and a human-review requirement.

test_cases.description: Create durable evidence for an AI-supported decision.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create an Exovia Proof Pack for this decision with the supporting evidence, open risks, governance statement and integrity fingerprint.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns an evidence manifest, reliability report, human-approval requirement, confirmation that no external action occurred and a SHA-256 fingerprint.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for a simple translation request.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Translate this paragraph from English to Spanish.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because translation does not require an Exovia reliability workflow.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not claim the app can execute a generated capability or production change.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Install this generated skill, approve the Assurance Council decision, publish its policy to production and email every customer.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked as an execution or approval tool because Exovia only produces inspectable read-only artifacts and accountable humans retain authority.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for unrelated entertainment recommendations.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Recommend three comedy movies for tonight.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because the request is unrelated to evidence, context, AI comparison, safe routing, assurance review, capability packaging, visual review or proof generation.
